tweets.text:
On the new Uneasy Money, @kaiynne, @tayvano_, and @LucaNetz get transformer paper co-author Illia Polosukhin ( @ilblackdragon ) to talk about why he thinks confidentiality is what finally lets businesses do real commerce onchain.

Timestamps:
🧠 00:52 The transformer paper: how Illia ended up on 'Attention Is All You Need'
🔗 05:57 Confidential Intents: how NEAR brings privacy to assets across every chain
💵 15:05 Why private stablecoins are the missing piece in on-chain commerce
🛡️ 24:58 Shield: NEAR's AI system scanning chains in real time to block illicit funds
🔓 25:46 The Litecoin MimbleWimble hack and what went wrong with the disclosure timeline
⛓️ 40:03 Multichain Advisors: Get help navigating TGEs, go‑to‑market, BD and partnerships, capital markets advisory, PR, media placements, KOL activations and more at https://t.co/fsTy2PEDx6.
🎯 40:39 Coinbase: Get 20% off the first year of your Coinbase One annual plan at https://t.co/gUBZGviDOn. 
🏛️ 42:24 What Vitalik's “smaller ship” post reveals about the Ethereum Foundation
🤝 48:33 How NEAR pitched its sharding work to the EF twice and got turned away
🛋️ 55:24 Tay compares the EF to Google and says "don't be evil" is a non-goal
🌐 63:45 Why Illia thinks decentralization is a tool, not a goal
🤖 68:22 How organizations change when AI agents can do the work
💀 78:34 Illia thinks DAOs “never worked” because of the credit assignment problem
📊 79:55 Illia's close: Markets solve what organizations can't

This is collateral damage, not a sanction against the Zama Protocol.

@duonine Yes it is not for all but for defi 

Decentralized store of value and collateral. Compliments eth as an asset.
thread_tweets.full_text:
@duonine Yes it is not for all but for defi 

Decentralized store of value and collateral. Compliments eth as an asset.

thread_tweets.text:
1) everything has a price
2) decentralized stablecoin backed by Ethereum Foundation would have strong branding power.

There is big demand for low volatility store of value. ETH, BTC, ZEC are too volatile and USDC/USDT have centralization risk.

DeStablecoins can't scale though so for BOLD to scale ETH price would need to pump.

Sure it is a leverage based system but I believe this volatility could be good for the system as more traders would be onchain etc.

Financial Times: "Wall Street equities notched up their ninth-straight week of gains....
The S&P 500 rose 1.4 per cent this week, pushing the blue-chip index to its longest weekly winning streak since December 2023. The gauge has jumped 16 per cent since the end of March, while the tech-focused Nasdaq Composite has soared almost 25 per cent."
#markets #stocks #investing #investors @ft

tweets.text:
참고로 말씀드리면, 저희는 투자 리서치 회사로서 모든 애널리스트가 엄격한 윤리 강령을 준수하도록 하고 있습니다. 해당 윤리 강령은 발간 전 당사의 거래제한 목록에 포함된 증권을 거래하는 것을 금지합니다. 또한 이 정책의 준수 여부를 확인하기 위해 임직원에게 본인의 증권계좌를 연동하도록 요구하고 있습니다.

그리고 좀 더 현실적인 관점에서 묻겠습니다. 누군가 한국 주식을 조작하려 했다면 정말 시가총액 35조 원, 하루 거래대금이 수천억 원에 달하는 종목을 목표로 삼았을 거라고 생각하십니까? 한국거래소 시가총액 24위 기업을 말입니다?

부패 운운하며 비난을 퍼붓기 전에 조금 더 비판적으로 생각해 보시는 편이 좋겠습니다. 뛰어난 애널리스트의 양질의 투자 리서치와, 정확한 투자 논지가 예상대로 전개된 것을 부패와 혼동하는 것은 무지를 드러내는 일입니다.

참고로 말씀드리면, 저희는 투자 리서치 회사로서 모든 애널리스트가 엄격한 윤리 강령을 준수하도록 하고 있습니다. 해당 윤리 강령은 발간 전 당사의 거래제한 목록에 포함된 증권을 거래하는 것을 금지합니다. 또한 이 정책의 준수 여부를 확인하기 위해 임직원에게 본인의 증권계좌를 연동하도록 요구하고 있습니다.

그리고 좀 더 현실적인 관점에서 묻겠습니다. 누군가 한국 주식을 조작하려 했다면 정말 시가총액 35조 원, 하루 거래대금이 수천억 원에 달하는 종목을 목표로 삼았을 거라고 생각하십니까? 한국거래소 시가총액 24위 기업을 말입니다?

부패 운운하며 비난을 퍼붓기 전에 조금 더 비판적으로 생각해 보시는 편이 좋겠습니다. 뛰어난 애널리스트의 양질의 투자 리서치와, 정확한 투자 논지가 예상대로 전개된 것을 부패와 혼동하는 것은 무지를 드러내는 일입니다.

tweets.text:
Per Foxconn shareholder meeting:

CPO switch products expected to begin Q3. 10K units 2026, explosive grow to next year.

Aims/expected to be #1 globally. 

Anyone remember which Foxconn subsidiary handles their advanced optical work?

cough.. cough.. Shunsin (6451).

Lot of these exponentially scaling volume shipments won’t show up in balance sheet yet, but will likely soon H2.

This is called frontrunning the next supercycle.

tweets.text:
Yep, I now have: Half a Million followers!

Thank you everyone. 

I think this virality validates how refreshing people find it…

When someone posts compelling ideas and research for free.

Especially while focusing on substance instead of a focus on selling you expensive paywalls. 

Markets are positive-sum where everyone benefits if a thesis is directionally correct. 

And I hope this signals an end of an era to all the grifters out there:

Who sell stock picks for hundreds a month or use their flashy private jets/net worth to try and validate their ideas.

As well as a lot of the media/institutions out there that work against retail investors.

I’m only here to help out retail by sharing ideas and my thoughts.

And I’m staying true to that mission regardless of any high offers I get for ads or any offers from institutions… 

And I’m especially not changing, despite any new follower counts I have. 

Thanks everyone for the support!

@KLismont Wow! I’m happy a Belgian newspaper talked positively about me.

They deserve a lot of praise for objective commentary.
thread_tweets.full_text:
@KLismont Wow! I’m happy a Belgian newspaper talked positively about me.

thread_tweets.text:
When I first joined it was primarily folks trying to sell expensive community paywalls or TAs. 

Everyone crowded around the same large stock $PYPL or $UNH investing if they had public thesis. Or hype names like $HIMS.

Large part of my popularity was focusing on critical chokepoints, which was my own investing style.

Having them validated in markets like $AXTI that went up a few thousand percent.

Then not gatekeeping any information. 

I’ve been getting a lot of copycats that are rising in popularity, but I actually encourage it if they bring their own opinions.

As this helps democratize alpha and ideas. 

I think the recent popularity is just from starting a completely new trend.

thread_tweets.text:
3/5

Note that the list above does NOT include SpaceX (which has Xai, or Grok), Anthropic, and OpenAI.  SpaceX's IPO is expected around June 12.

So, when will they be included in the S&P 500, allowing AI to account for over 50% of the S&P 500?

Last week, S&P proposed changing its rules so that mega-cap IPOs could become eligible for S&P 500 inclusion after six months, rather than the usual one-year seasoning period. 

The proposal would also relax some standard hurdles for these companies, including minimum public float and profitability requirements.

But S&P emphasized that eligibility does not mean automatic inclusion—the Index Committee would still make the final decision.

What are the AI-Stocks? 

I use the list that J.P. Morgan's Michael Cemblast made last fall.

Here is a table with its details. https://t.co/R13KORGhce

thread_tweets.text:
4/5

On Nov 22, 2022, ChatGPT released a free research preview. This launched the "Generative AI era." That is, ask a question, get an answer.

Since this release, AI stocks (blue) have accounted for 70% of the gains in the S&P 500's market capitalization.

The "other 459" accounted for 30% of its gain.
thread_tweets.full_text:
4/5

On Nov 22, 2022, ChatGPT released a free research preview. This launched the "Generative AI era." That is, ask a question, get an answer.

Since this release, AI stocks (blue) have accounted for 70% of the gains in the S&P 500's market capitalization.

The "other 459" accounted for 30% of its gain.

thread_tweets.text:
5/5

Similarly, on January 12, 2026, Claude Cowork and Moltbook (now OpenClaw) pushed "Agenti AI" into the mainstream.

Agenti AI is where AI can "do things for you." Create files (like PowerPoint slides or Excel spreadsheets), update files, and sort information in files on your computer.

Since this date, the S&P 500's market capitalization has increased by 8.91% (black line). The 41 AI stocks accounted for 7.61% of this gain, or 85% of the  S&P 500's rally has been AI-related since Cowork and OpenClaw burst onto the scene.
thread_tweets.full_text:
5/5

Similarly, on January 12, 2026, Claude Cowork and Moltbook (now OpenClaw) pushed "Agenti AI" into the mainstream.

Agenti AI is where AI can "do things for you." Create files (like PowerPoint slides or Excel spreadsheets), update files, and sort information in files on your computer.

Since this date, the S&P 500's market capitalization has increased by 8.91% (black line). The 41 AI stocks accounted for 7.61% of this gain, or 85% of the  S&P 500's rally has been AI-related since Cowork and OpenClaw burst onto the scene.

tweets.full_text:
1/5

Yesterday, AI-related stocks hit a high as a percentage of the S&P 500.

The AI influence on the stock market has never been larger.
🧵 https://t.co/BpGDKbFYxe

3/5

Note that the list above does NOT include SpaceX (which has Xai, or Grok), Anthropic, and OpenAI.  SpaceX's IPO is expected around June 12.

So, when will they be included in the S&P 500, allowing AI to account for over 50% of the S&P 500?

Last week, S&P proposed changing its rules so that mega-cap IPOs could become eligible for S&P 500 inclusion after six months, rather than the usual one-year seasoning period. 

The proposal would also relax some standard hurdles for these companies, including minimum public float and profitability requirements.

But S&P emphasized that eligibility does not mean automatic inclusion—the Index Committee would still make the final decision.

2/5

What are the AI-Stocks? 

I use the list that J.P. Morgan's Michael Cemblast made last fall.

Here is a table with its details. https://t.co/R13KORGhce

4/5

On Nov 22, 2022, ChatGPT released a free research preview. This launched the "Generative AI era." That is, ask a question, get an answer.

Since this release, AI stocks (blue) have accounted for 70% of the gains in the S&P 500's market capitalization.

The "other 459" accounted for 30% of its gain.

5/5

Similarly, on January 12, 2026, Claude Cowork and Moltbook (now OpenClaw) pushed "Agenti AI" into the mainstream.

Agenti AI is where AI can "do things for you." Create files (like PowerPoint slides or Excel spreadsheets), update files, and sort information in files on your computer.

Since this date, the S&P 500's market capitalization has increased by 8.91% (black line). The 41 AI stocks accounted for 7.61% of this gain, or 85% of the  S&P 500's rally has been AI-related since Cowork and OpenClaw burst onto the scene.

tweets.text:
the exact opposite will happen. people will stop learning new languages because ai will translate in real time.

google already has this with live translate, Apple lets you do it with airpods 

people tend to choose convenience over hardship when the tech is cheap (and quick) enough to enable it.

we have a while to go until multi-language are actually good enough to understand the various nuance, tones, slang across every language but we’ll eventually get there.
tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
its genuinely shocking to me that we haven't made giant strides in language acquisition due to ai.

it doesn't feel dramatically easier/faster to learn a new language than it was 24-36 months ago. why?
tweets.full_text:
the exact opposite will happen. people will stop learning new languages because ai will translate in real time.

google already has this with live translate, Apple lets you do it with airpods 

people tend to choose convenience over hardship when the tech is cheap (and quick) enough to enable it.

we have a while to go until multi-language are actually good enough to understand the various nuance, tones, slang across every language but we’ll eventually get there.
